response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the 'FLY HIGH!!' reference JSON and web-verified lyrics. The provided reference JSON only covered the first verse; I have transcribed the full performance which continues throughout the video. I also included the English dialogue during the action sequence at 04:36 and the opening line of Risu's original song 'MIR//or' at 04:52. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the vocal audio, including the mid-song pause for the instrumental solo.

subtitles.original: 汗と血と涙で
光る翼で
今全部全部置キ去って
飛べ FLY HIGH!!
飛べ FLY 高く FLY
最果ての未来へ
subtitles.english: To the farthest reaches of the future

subtitles.original: 傷だらけの若鳥が
subtitles.english: A young bird covered in wounds

subtitles.original: 空を睨んでる
低空飛行する奴らが笑おうと
subtitles.english: Even if those flying at low altitudes laugh at you

subtitles.original: 海の果てが見たい
subtitles.english: I want to see the end of the sea

subtitles.original: 心を無にして向かい風に乗り
subtitles.english: Empty your heart, ride the headwind

subtitles.original: 助走をつけて
ホップステップジャンプで
飛べ FLY HIGH!!
汗と血と涙で光る翼が
subtitles.english: Those wings shining with sweat, blood, and tears

subtitles.original: 君をどこへだって連れて行く
subtitles.english: will take you anywhere you want to go

subtitles.original: 青い衝動と 本能と
爪牙を剥き出しにして
困難の旅路も 夢叶うまで
subtitles.english: No matter how difficult the journey, until your dream comes true

subtitles.original: 何度だって
飛べ FLY
高く FLY
最果ての未来へ
subtitles.english: To the farthest reaches of the future

subtitles.original: ポツリ降り出した雨が翼狂わせる
subtitles.english: The rain that suddenly started falling disturbs your wings

subtitles.original: 行く手には黒い雲
今長い嵐의夜が来る
subtitles.english: Now a long, stormy night is coming

subtitles.original: 轟く雷鳴と砕ける波濤を喝采にして
subtitles.english: Turn the roaring thunder and crashing waves into your applause

subtitles.original: アン ドゥ トロワで
飛べ FLY HIGH!!
いつも胸の奥を焦がす焔が
subtitles.english: The flame that is always burning deep in your heart

subtitles.original: 路を照らし出す灯台になる
subtitles.english: will become a lighthouse that illuminates your path

subtitles.original: 夜明け前の光芒が 才能の華
subtitles.english: The rays of light before dawn

subtitles.original: 咲かすから
subtitles.english: will make the flower of your talent bloom

subtitles.original: 命尽きるまで限界を超え最高速で
subtitles.english: Until your life runs out, exceed your limits at top speed

高く FLY

subtitles.original: It's over now, evil monster!
I have the high ground!
If I love you, would you love me too?
subtitles.english: If I love you, would you love me too?
